title: L60 - work_pattern_performance_profiles
description: Aggregate pattern performance metrics — computed view layer tracking how well each reusable pattern (L58) performs across all applications (L59). Provides success rates, timing data, and common adaptations for pattern tuning and selection guidance. Parent: None (aggregate/view layer, RESTRICT on pattern delete).

pattern_id.description: FK to L58 work_reusable_patterns (RESTRICT on delete). Which pattern this profile tracks.

total_applications.description: Total number of times this pattern has been applied (count of L59 records for this pattern)

success_rate.description: Aggregate success rate: average of all success_score values from L59 applications (0.0 = all failed, 1.0 = all succeeded)

avg_duration_seconds.description: Average duration of work units that applied this pattern (nullable if duration not tracked)

p95_duration_seconds.description: 95th percentile duration (high-water mark for most applications)

common_adaptations.description: Most frequently made adaptations across all applications (top 5 by frequency). Helps identify pattern improvement opportunities.

adaptation_description.description: Description of the common adaptation (aggregated from L59.adaptations_made)

frequency.description: How many times this adaptation was made across all applications

step_numbers.description: Which pattern steps are typically adapted (references L58 pattern.steps[].step_number)

source_application_ids.description: FK array to L59 work_pattern_applications. All application IDs used to compute this profile (for audit trail and backfill).

last_updated.description: When this profile was last re-computed (ISO8601 timestamp)

computation_method.description: How this profile was computed (for transparency)

notes.description: Additional observations or tuning guidance based on profile analysis

created_by.description: Identifier of creator (typically system/agent that computes profiles)
